name: valorant-tracker-backend
description: Backend API for VALORANT skin tracker

scripts.build:exe: npm run build:frontend && npx pkg . --targets node18-win-x64 --output ../release/ValorantTrackerBackend.exe && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.resolve('../frontend/dist');const dest=path.resolve('../release/frontend-dist');fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(dest,{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});"
